card.htmlComment: 7 — Nightshard. Hard Surface + Game Asset badge

desc.en: Hero weapon asset. 4K PBR textures, optimised for real-time.
Hero weapon for a third-person action title. 4K PBR textures, optimised for real-time.
desc.ru: Hero-оружие под TPS-action. 4K PBR-текстуры, оптимизация под real-time.

desc.en: Albedo, roughness, metalness, normal and AO maps. Baked from 8M-poly high source.
desc.ru: Albedo, roughness, metalness, normal и AO. Запечены с 8M-poly high-source.

desc.en: Game-ready mesh at 12 k triangles — within budget for character-attachment LOD0.
desc.ru: Game-ready меш на 12k tris — в бюджете под character-attachment LOD0.

desc.en: Live capture inside Unreal Engine 5 using Nanite-disabled preview with Lumen.
desc.ru: Live-capture в Unreal Engine 5: Nanite-disabled preview с Lumen.

desc.en: Edge chip detail pass. Anisotropic reflection matches reference from real forged steel.
desc.ru: Пасс детализации сколов на кромке. Anisotropic reflection совпадает с reference кованой стали.

body.en: Socket points, collision primitives and a simple Blueprint-compatible animation rig are included in the deliverable. Ready to be imported and attached to a character skeleton on arrival.
body.ru: В поставке: socket-points, collision-примитивы и простой Blueprint-совместимый animation rig. Готов к импорту и attach к скелету персонажа из коробки.

body.en: Index of refraction tuned to 1.52 for lead crystal. Dispersion faked with a three-channel UV offset in post.
body.ru: IOR 1.52 под lead crystal. Dispersion имитирован через 3-канальный UV-offset в посте.
